import re
from typing import Dict, List

def normalize_email(email: str) -> str:
    email = email.strip().lower()
    email = re.sub(r'\s+', '', email)
    return email

def normalize_phone(phone: str) -> str:
    digits = re.sub(r'\D', '', phone)
    if len(digits) == 11 and digits.startswith('1'):
        digits = digits[1:]
    return f"({digits[:3]}) {digits[3:6]}-{digits[6:]}"

def normalize_address(address: str) -> str:
    address = address.strip()
    address = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', address)
    address = address.replace("Street", "St").replace("Avenue", "Ave")
    address = address.replace("Boulevard", "Blvd").replace("Drive", "Dr")
    return address

def process_user(user: dict) -> dict:
    user["email"] = normalize_email(user["email"])
    user["phone"] = normalize_phone(user["phone"])
    user["address"] = normalize_address(user["address"])
    return user

def process_lead(lead: dict) -> dict:
    lead["email"] = normalize_email(lead["email"])
    lead["phone"] = normalize_phone(lead["phone"])
    lead["address"] = normalize_address(lead["address"])
    return lead

def process_contact(contact: dict) -> dict:
    contact["email"] = normalize_email(contact["email"])
    contact["phone"] = normalize_phone(contact["phone"])
    contact["address"] = normalize_address(contact["address"])
    return contact
